title: aeranthes funalis
intro: Aeranthes funalis, also known as the orchid with fragrant flowers, is a species of flowering plant in the family Orchidaceae. The medicinal properties of Aeranthes funalis have been used in traditional medicine, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Aeranthes funalis include reducing inflammation, soothing coughs, and aiding in the relief of congestion, making it a valuable herbal remedy for respiratory ailments. Aeranthes funalis can be prepared as a tea or infusion by steeping the flowers in hot water, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
